article_title: Five headaches Andy Burnham will have to deal with as PM

tasks.prompt: What is the main purpose of the article?
options: To examine five major policy challenges Andy Burnham will inherit as prime minister
To describe Burnham's childhood and family life
To report the results of a local football match
To argue that the UK has no economic problems
tasks.correct_answer: To examine five major policy challenges Andy Burnham will inherit as prime minister
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה בוחנת חמישה אתגרי מדיניות מרכזיים שאנדי ברנהם צפוי לרשת עם כניסתו לתפקיד ראש הממשלה.

tasks.prompt: Which two policy areas are explicitly highlighted in the article's introduction?
options: Tourism and professional sport
Defence spending and housing
Fishing and space research
University admissions and broadcasting
tasks.explanation_hebrew: כותרת המשנה מציינת במפורש את הוצאות הביטחון והדיור בין האתגרים.

tasks.prompt: Which area of public spending is discussed through disability, eligibility and projected costs?
options: Welfare benefits
Foreign aid only
Railway ticket prices
Arts funding
tasks.explanation_hebrew: המונחים disability, eligibility ו-projected costs מופיעים בדיון על הוצאות רווחה וקצבאות.

tasks.prompt: Why is defence procurement presented as a difficult issue?
options: It involves expensive, slow and sometimes wasteful purchasing decisions
The UK has stopped buying all military equipment
It is controlled entirely by local councils
It has no connection to government budgets
tasks.correct_answer: It involves expensive, slow and sometimes wasteful purchasing decisions
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מציגה רכש ביטחוני כתחום יקר ומורכב, שעלול להיות איטי ובזבזני.

tasks.prompt: Why could major spending cuts create a political backlash?
options: They may affect underfunded services and people who depend on welfare support
They would automatically increase every household's income
They would remove all fiscal constraints
They are supported by every political group
tasks.correct_answer: They may affect underfunded services and people who depend on welfare support
tasks.explanation_hebrew: קיצוצים עלולים לפגוע בשירותים ובזכאים לתמיכה ולכן לעורר התנגדות ציבורית ופוליטית.

tasks.prompt: Which statement best captures Burnham's overall dilemma?
options: He must improve services and meet policy promises while staying within tight fiscal limits
He can increase every budget without raising revenue
He only needs to decide where to live
His main task is choosing a new party name
tasks.correct_answer: He must improve services and meet policy promises while staying within tight fiscal limits
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הדילמה המרכזית היא איזון בין שיפור שירותים ומימוש הבטחות לבין מגבלות תקציביות.

tasks.prompt: Name three policy challenges discussed in the article.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שלושה תחומים מתוך הכתבה, כגון רווחה וקצבאות נכות, ביטחון ורכש, שירותים ציבוריים, דיור או הכשרה מקצועית.

tasks.prompt: Why might changing welfare eligibility be politically difficult?
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להסביר ששינוי הזכאות משפיע ישירות על אנשים פגיעים, עשוי לחסוך כסף אך לעורר מרד במפלגה או זעקה ציבורית.
expected_points: It affects people who rely on benefits
Tighter eligibility could reduce projected costs
Changes could trigger public backlash or a revolt among lawmakers
The government must balance savings with fairness

tasks.prompt: Write a 3-4 sentence summary of Burnham's policy and fiscal challenges as described in the article.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לסכם לפחות שלושה אתגרים ולהסביר את המתח בין התחייבויות פוליטיות, שירותים ציבוריים והכללים התקציביים.
expected_points: Explains the need to follow fiscal rules
Shows the political risk of unpopular reforms

tasks.prompt: Choose one of the five challenges and propose a balanced first step for the new prime minister.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לבחור אתגר אחד, להציע צעד מעשי, להסביר כיצד הוא מסייע ולציין מגבלה תקציבית או פוליטית אחת.
expected_points: Acknowledges a fiscal or political trade-off
